message:
fix(command): READONLY/READWRITE return OK when cluster_enabled (br-frankenredis-jsr7, partial)

Upstream cluster.c::readonlyCommand / readwriteCommand:
  - cluster_enabled=0 -> "ERR This instance has cluster support disabled"
  - cluster_enabled=1 -> +OK

Our impl returned the error unconditionally regardless of cluster_enabled.
Thread the Store through and honor the flag. Per-client CLIENT_READONLY
bit-flag not yet tracked (cluster-routing concern, larger jsr7 subtask).

Partial fix toward frankenredis-jsr7 — 15 CLUSTER admin subcommands
(MEET/FORGET/REPLICATE/FAILOVER/ADDSLOTS/DELSLOTS/.../SLOTSTATE) still
return the blanket disabled error regardless of cluster_enabled and are
not addressed here.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
